description: issue #136 / spec/tooling.md:198-205's flagship worked example: with turtle-rendering active, forward is a visible Turtle & Rendering primitive, so the typo `fowad` raises ol-unknown-command with a did-you-mean suggesting it — reproducing the spec's exact finding shape (name: 'fowad', suggestion: 'forward'). Parenthesized form: an unrecognized bare callee's arity falls back to 0 in the reader, so a bare `fowad 100` would leave `100` as a stray second statement on the line (a parse-stage ol-bad-token, orthogonal to this rule) — `(fowad 100)` groups the argument explicitly, isolating the semantic finding.
